args.content:
Activity 5: Virtual Escape Room
  - Description: Team members work together online to solve a series of puzzles and riddles to "escape" within a set time limit. The activity encourages communication, critical thinking, and collaboration.
  - Objective: To strengthen problem-solving skills and promote teamwork in a fun and engaging virtual environment.
  - Location: Online (video conferencing platform)
  - Date: 2024-12-13
  - Time: 14:00 - 16:00

Activity 6: Volunteer Day
  - Description: The team spends a day volunteering at a local charity or community organization. Activities may include food drives, park clean-ups, or mentoring programs.
  - Objective: To foster team spirit, social responsibility, and a sense of shared purpose beyond the workplace.
  - Location: Local charity or community organization (TBD)
  - Date: 2024-12-20
  - Time: 09:00 - 14:00

Activity\
